substep.title: Load Criteria
substep.action: Load references/codesmith/parallel-safety-criteria.md. Four criteria: file-overlap, logical-dependency, module-boundary, shared-infra. Default = sequential unless ALL four clear as parallel-safe.

substep.title: Evaluate Each Pairing
substep.action:
For each pair of plans (plan_i, plan_j) where i < j:
- file-overlap: compare the Files tables in their plan docs. Any overlap → fail.
- logical-dependency: plan_j's slices depend on any output (types, schemas, APIs) of plan_i's slices? → fail.
- module-boundary: both plans confined to a single module per ADRs? If yes → fail (they share boundary). Plans should live in distinct modules.
- shared-infra: do they both touch migrations / package.json / Cargo.toml / build configs? Any shared infra file → fail.
Record evidence per criterion + pairing.

substep.title: Determine Verdict
substep.action: Verdict = parallel iff ALL pairings clear ALL four criteria. Otherwise = sequential.

substep.title: Document in Plan-1 Doc
